mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auto_invest_executions (auto_invest_stock_id, round_no, trigger_source, side, exec_date, status, fail_reason, order_id, exec_amount, exec_quantity, currency) VALUES (#{autoInvestStockId}, #{roundNo}, #{triggerSource}, #{side}, #{execDate}, #{status}, #{failReason}, #{orderId}, #{execAmount}, #{execQuantity}, #{currency})
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.auto_invest_stock_id, e.round_no, e.trigger_source, e.side, e.exec_date, e.status, e.fail_reason, e.order_id, e.exec_amount, e.exec_quantity, e.currency, e.created_at, o.status AS order_status FROM auto_invest_executions e LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = e.order_id WHERE e.auto_invest_stock_id = #{autoInvestStockId} ORDER BY e.round_no DESC
